displayName: Claude Code with RateLoop Workspace plugin
knownQuirks: Two install lanes to exercise: plugin marketplace path and `claude mcp add --transport http <url>`; OAuth runs from /mcp.
The generated Codex plugin message is not a universal Claude install path (compatibility review snapshot); use the Claude-specific affordance.

steps.name: Install via the Claude plugin path at the pinned CLI version
steps.instructions: On a clean Claude Code install at the exact pinned version (record it as clientVersion), install the RateLoop Workspace plugin via the marketplace path, and separately exercise `claude mcp add --transport http` for the protected workspace URL. Record every trust/install prompt. Fail if any credential, connection URL, or fragment lands in chat history, settings files, or shell history instructions.

steps.name: Complete OAuth from /mcp against the protected workspace server
steps.instructions: Run the host's /mcp OAuth flow: discovery, dynamic client registration, S256 PKCE, exchange, resource binding. Approve consent as the workspace owner. Fail if the flow asks for the connection link a second time or reflects a token or authorization URL into the transcript.

steps.name: One-session lifecycle: initialize through later tool calls
steps.instructions: Verify initialize -> notifications/initialized -> tools/list -> claim -> context -> verify -> ping -> tools/list on ONE MCP session with no undocumented reconnect. Prefer the one-call rateloop_connect_workspace path; also confirm the granular fallback. Repeat the claim to confirm idempotency with exactly one connected event.

steps.name: Agent context read returns the bound policy
steps.instructions: Call rateloop_get_agent_context and confirm it returns the effective server-bound human-review configuration for the connected integration only. Fail if it exposes private artifacts or another integration's scope.

steps.name: Connection verification is idempotent and non-evaluative
steps.instructions: Call rateloop_verify_connection and confirm success, then repeat it and confirm idempotency. Verify server-side that verification created no review opportunity, evidence, spending, or publishing state, and that exactly one connected event exists.

steps.name: Resume in a fresh session without re-asking for the link
steps.instructions: Start a new Claude Code session (and separately restart the CLI). The agent must rediscover the connection via rateloop_get_agent_context without asking for the connection URL again and without creating a polling service. Fail if a still-valid token family requires a fresh OAuth grant.
